alkylation reagent: 20 mM IAA was added and incubated in the dark at 37 °C for 45 min.
alkylation concentration: 20 mM IAA was added and incubated in the dark at 37 °C for 45 min.
fractionation method: the samples were fractionated using an Agilent HPLC system into 14 individual fractions.
instrument: LC-MS/MS analysis was performed using a Q-Exactive Plus Orbitrap mass spectrometer.
ionization type: peptide precursors were ionized using an EASY-Spray ionization source.
labeling: the peptides were labeled with isotopically heavy and light dimethyl labels.
